title: Gentle Steamed Dutch Fish Wrap
description: A tender and umami Dutch dish featuring dashi and leaf-wrapped steamed fish, perfect for a hangover cure. This pescatarian-friendly meal is a unique blend of flavors and textures.

ingredients.name: collard green leaves
ingredients.notes: fresh and large enough to wrap fish

instructions: Preheat the steamer to 180 degrees Fahrenheit.
Prepare the dashi broth by heating it to a simmer.
Season the cod fillets with salt, black pepper, and garlic.
Wrap each cod fillet in a collard green leaf, making sure to seal the edges.
Place the wrapped fish in the steamer and steam for 8 minutes.
While the fish is steaming, mix the lemon juice and olive oil in a small bowl.
After the fish is cooked, remove it from the steamer and brush with the lemon juice mixture.
Serve the fish with a side of hot dashi broth and garnish with chopped scallions if desired.
Garnish with lemon wedges and serve immediately.
